elections.note: Certified final = 'Total Voters' 39,629 (precinct 9,383 + VBM 30,246) from CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County (note typo 'particpiation' in the real SoS URL). Election-night first-report ballot count not sourceable here (Wayback blocked; no press release/news figure found). Kept as a pre-e-pollbook midterm denominator baseline.

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 56,800 (precinct 12,543 + VBM 44,257), CA SoS SoV. First-report proxy ~21,000: YubaNet live coverage said the first batch (~8:45pm) was the vote-by-mail ballots received the prior week, 'expecting some 21,000 votes'; the countywide Measure A first report totaled ~20,922 votes (14,068 yes + 6,854 no), corroborating ~21,000 ballots. Pre-e-pollbook, pre-ASV. pct approximate.

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 54,996 (precinct 3,059 + VBM 51,937), CA SoS SoV; matches county's reported 54,996/79.86% turnout. First-report proxy ~21,931: YubaNet live results, first VBM batch ~8:34pm, where the countywide Sheriff-Coroner race opened at 12,133 + 9,798 = 21,931 votes (actual ballots marginally higher due to undervotes); end-of-night ~25,004 on that race. First November general after Nevada County's 2018 Voter's Choice Act switch to vote centers + electronic pollbooks. pct approximate, slightly understated.

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 65,800 (precinct 6,238 + VBM 59,562), CA SoS SoV. Election-night proxy ~25,000: Assistant Registrar Natalie Adona quoted by YubaNet that 'only roughly 25,000 of these ballots were counted on Election Day' (short-staffed); cumulative reached 30,488 (40.94% of 74,467 issued) by the Nov 4 third update. Post-e-pollbook, pre-ASV. pct approximate; uses the Election-Day figure, not the later Nov 4 cumulative.

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 51,370 (precinct 3,949 + VBM 47,421), CA SoS SoV. First-report = 26,213 ballots (35% of ballots issued) released 8:31pm per YubaNet quoting Nevada County Elections; end-of-election-night total reached 28,824 (38.83% of 74,225 VBM issued). First November general using automated signature verification (adopted 2022). Strongest, most explicitly-dated election-night first-batch figure in the series.

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 63,240 (precinct 8,047 + VBM 55,193), CA SoS SoV. Election-night cumulative = 15,486 ballots (20.41% of 75,881 registered) per YubaNet, last update ~11:37pm. ANOMALY: a ballot printing/scanning defect forced manual rescanning, so far fewer ballots than usual were tabulated election night (the ~8pm first tranche was smaller and not separately sourced). Post-e-pollbook, post-ASV, but pct is depressed by the printing problem, not comparable to a normal count.
